title: lactuca obtusa
intro: Lactuca obtusa, also known as prickly lettuce or wild opium lettuce, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, particularly lactucarium, which has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing pain and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antispasmodic. Lactuca obtusa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, headaches, and muscle spasms.
